title: Curaleaf Holdings, Inc. (CURLF) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates
text: Curaleaf came out with quarterly earnings of $0.09 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of a loss of $0.08 per share. This compares to a loss of $0.07 per share a year ago. The company posted revenues of $324.23 million for the quarter ended March 2026, surpassing the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 2.40%, compared to year-ago revenues of $310.01 million. The company has topped consensus revenue estimates three times over the last four quarters. Next quarter earnings estimate for CURLF is -$0.07 with a range of -$0.09 to -$0.03. Next quarter sales forecast for CURLF is $317.05M with a range of $314.00M to $323.10M. As of the earnings date, Curaleaf shares are valued at $3.96, with a market cap of 3.07B. CURLF has received 3 Buy Ratings, 0 Hold Ratings, and 0 Sell Ratings, with an average Analyst price target of 3.75.
